title: SV: interface as port item is not supported

features.name: interface_as_module_port
features.description: Code should include a module declaration with an interface-typed port, where the interface is defined with an input port
features.snippet:
interface apb_if (input bit pclk); logic psel; endinterface : apb_if
module m (apb_if if_0); endmodule : m
